description_long: This object is a blocky, pixelated toilet with a classic design, featuring a rounded bowl and a rectangular cistern mounted at the back. The toilet seat is present and raised, revealing the interior of the bowl, which is also rendered in a stepped, voxel-like style. The cistern has a visible flush lever on the side, and the base of the toilet is detailed with alternating bands, giving it a stylized, geometric appearance. The overall color is a uniform white with some gray shading, and the surfaces appear hard and smooth, typical of ceramic toilets. The toilet is floor-mounted, with a solid base extending to the ground. There are no visible accessibility features such as grab bars or raised seats.
description: A stylized, blocky white toilet with a raised seat, rectangular cistern, and visible flush lever, rendered in a geometric, voxel-like style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open seat, rounded bowl, and the rectangular cistern with a flush lever on the right.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the raised seat, the stepped base, and the flush lever on the cistern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cistern and the solid base, with no visible functional parts.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the open seat, the stepped base, and the flush lever on the left side of the cistern.
